hooks.prompt: The CRE Skills plugin is active with 91 CRE skills, 40 expert agents, and 6 workflow chains. For any CRE task, read the routing index at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/routing/CRE-ROUTING.md to find the right skill. Do NOT load all SKILL.md files -- use the routing index to identify the correct one, then load only that skill's SKILL.md and references/. Available commands: /cre-skills:cre-route (find a skill), /cre-skills:cre-workflows (workflow chains), /cre-skills:cre-agents (expert agents), /cre-skills:usage-stats (telemetry summary), /cre-skills:feedback-summary (skill feedback log). Telemetry and feedback are opt-in. Configure at ~/.cre-skills/config.json.
